item.title: : Buying a Decommissioned Fighter Jet
item.description: A look at the purchase of a retired fighter jet, including its condition, history, and what ownership involves. Storage, transport, and restoration all present challenges. Would you take on a project like this?

media:content.media:title: : Buying a Decommissioned Fighter Jet
media:content.media:description: A look at the purchase of a retired fighter jet, including its condition, history, and what ownership involves. Storage, transport, and restoration all present challenges. Would you take on a project like this?

item.title: Reviving a Long-Idle Airplane
item.description: Follow the process of bringing a long-idle aircraft back to working condition, from inspection to first start attempts. What would be the biggest challenge?

media:content.media:title: Reviving a Long-Idle Airplane
media:content.media:description: Follow the process of bringing a long-idle aircraft back to working condition, from inspection to first start attempts. What would be the biggest challenge?

item.title: An Abandoned Plane for $17,500
item.description: An unused aircraft is offered at a surprisingly low price, raising questions about condition, restoration costs, and value. Would you take on a project like this?

media:content.media:title: An Abandoned Plane for $17,500
media:content.media:description: An unused aircraft is offered at a surprisingly low price, raising questions about condition, restoration costs, and value. Would you take on a project like this?

item.title: Can It Run Again and Fly Home?
item.description: Jimmys World looks at whether the aircraft can run again and make the 570-mile trip home.

media:content.media:title: Can It Run Again and Fly Home?
media:content.media:description: Jimmys World looks at whether the aircraft can run again and make the 570-mile trip home.

item.title: A Plane With a Notable History
item.description: A look at an aircraft with a unique past, exploring its background, design, and role over time. What makes a plane’s history stand out?

media:content.media:title: A Plane With a Notable History
media:content.media:description: A look at an aircraft with a unique past, exploring its background, design, and role over time. What makes a plane’s history stand out?

item.title: Exploring an Abandoned Aircraft Find
item.description: A closer look at an abandoned aircraft, uncovering its condition, history, and unanswered questions. What do you think its story is?

media:content.media:title: Exploring an Abandoned Aircraft Find
media:content.media:description: A closer look at an abandoned aircraft, uncovering its condition, history, and unanswered questions. What do you think its story is?

item.title: The moment they saw their airplane again
item.description: A heartfelt moment as an aircraft is rediscovered after time apart, bringing back memories and stories. What would you feel in that moment?

media:content.media:title: The moment they saw their airplane again
media:content.media:description: A heartfelt moment as an aircraft is rediscovered after time apart, bringing back memories and stories. What would you feel in that moment?
